lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਨਗਰੀ ਸਬਦੇ ਖੋਜੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਵੰ ਨਿਧਿ ਪਾਈ ॥੨੨॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa nagaree sabade khoje naam navan nidh paaee |22|
lines.english: One who searches the village of the body, through the Shabad, obtains the nine treasures of the Naam. ||22||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਸਾ ਮਾਰਿ ਮਨੁ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਣਾ ਬਿਨੁ ਰਸਨਾ ਉਸਤਤਿ ਕਰਾਈ ॥੨੩॥
lines.translit: manasaa maar man sehaj samaanaa bin rasanaa usatat karaaee |23|
lines.english: Conquering desire, the mind is absorbed in intuitive ease, and then one chants the Lord's Praises without speaking. ||23||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋਇਣ ਦੇਖਿ ਰਹੇ ਬਿਸਮਾਦੀ ਚਿਤੁ ਅਦਿਸਟਿ ਲਗਾਈ ॥੨੪॥
lines.translit: loein dekh rahe bisamaadee chit adisatt lagaaee |24|
lines.english: Let your eyes gaze upon the Wondrous Lord; let your consciousness be attached to the Unseen Lord. ||24||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਗੁਰੁ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਸਦਾ ਆਪਣਾ ਜਿਨਿ ਸਾਚੀ ਬੂਝ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥੨੬॥
lines.translit: hau gur saalaahee sadaa aapanaa jin saachee boojh bujhaaee |26|
lines.english: I praise my Guru forever, who has inspired me to understand this true understanding. ||26||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਦਿਸਟੁ ਸਦਾ ਰਹੈ ਨਿਰਾਲਮੁ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਈ ॥੨੫॥
lines.translit: adisatt sadaa rahai niraalam jotee jot milaaee |25|
lines.english: The Unseen Lord is forever absolute and immaculate; one's light merges into the Light. ||25||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਏਕ ਕਹੈ ਬੇਨੰਤੀ ਨਾਵਹੁ ਗਤਿ ਪਤਿ ਪਾਈ ॥੨੭॥੨॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: naanak ek kahai benantee naavahu gat pat paaee |27|2|11|
lines.english: Nanak offers this one prayer: through the Name, may I find salvation and honor. ||27||2||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਪੂਜਾ ਦੁਲੰਭ ਹੈ ਸੰਤਹੁ ਕਹਣਾ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har kee poojaa dulanbh hai santahu kahanaa kachhoo na jaaee |1|
lines.english: It is so hard to obtain that devotional worship of the Lord, O Saints. It cannot be described at all. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਹੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪੂਰਾ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: santahu guramukh pooraa paaee |
lines.english: O Saints, as Gurmukh, find the Perfect Lord,

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮਕਲੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: raamakalee mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Raamkalee, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੋ ਪੂਜ ਕਰਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naamo pooj karaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: and worship the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਮੈਲਾ ਸੰਤਹੁ ਕਿਆ ਹਉ ਪੂਜ ਚੜਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har bin sabh kichh mailaa santahu kiaa hau pooj charraaee |2|
lines.english: Without the Lord, everything is filthy, O Saints; what offering should I place before Him? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਜਾ ਕਰੈ ਸਭੁ ਲੋਕੁ ਸੰਤਹੁ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਥਾਇ ਨ ਪਾਈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: poojaa karai sabh lok santahu manamukh thaae na paaee |4|
lines.english: Everyone worships Him, O Saints, but the self-willed manmukh is not accepted or approved. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਾਚੇ ਭਾਵੈ ਸਾ ਪੂਜਾ ਹੋਵੈ ਭਾਣਾ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har saache bhaavai saa poojaa hovai bhaanaa man vasaaee |3|
lines.english: Whatever pleases the True Lord is devotional worship; His Will abides in the mind. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਵਿਤ ਪਾਵਨ ਸੇ ਜਨ ਸਾਚੇ ਏਕ ਸਬਦਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: pavit paavan se jan saache ek sabad liv laaee |6|
lines.english: Sanctified and pure are those true beings, who enshrine love for the Shabad. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਮਰੈ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਸੰਤਹੁ ਏਹ ਪੂਜਾ ਥਾਇ ਪਾਈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: sabad marai man niramal santahu eeh poojaa thaae paaee |5|
lines.english: If someone dies in the Word of the Shabad, his mind become immaculate, O Saints; such worship is accepted and approved. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਹੋਰ ਪੂਜ ਨ ਹੋਵੀ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲੀ ਲੋਕਾਈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: bin naavai hor pooj na hovee bharam bhulee lokaaee |7|
lines.english: There is no worship of the Lord, other than the Name; the world wanders, deluded by doubt. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਸੰਤਹੁ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: guramukh aap pachhaanai santahu raam naam liv laaee |8|
lines.english: The Gurmukh understands his own self, O Saints; he lolvingly centers his mind on the Lord's Name. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਜਾ ਕਰਹਿ ਪਰੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਮਲੁ ਲਾਈ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: poojaa kareh par bidh nahee jaaneh doojai bhaae mal laaee |10|
lines.english: Those who worship Him, but do not know the Way, are polluted with the love of duality. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਪੂਜ ਕਰਾਏ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਥਾਇ ਪਾਈ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: aape niramal pooj karaae gurasabadee thaae paaee |9|
lines.english: The Immaculate Lord Himself inspires worship of Him; through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, it is accepted and approved. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੁ ਪੂਜਾ ਜਾਣੈ ਭਾਣਾ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਾਈ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai su poojaa jaanai bhaanaa man vasaaee |11|
lines.english: One who becomes Gurmukh, knows what worship is; the Lord's Will abides within his mind. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਣੇ ਤੇ ਸਭਿ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਵੈ ਸੰਤਹੁ ਅੰਤੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਖਾਈ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: bhaane te sabh sukh paavai santahu ante naam sakhaaee |12|
lines.english: One who accepts the Lord's Will obtains total peace, O Saints; in the end, the Naam will be our help and support. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਣਾ ਆਪੁ ਨ ਪਛਾਣਹਿ ਸੰਤਹੁ ਕੂੜਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: apanaa aap na pachhaaneh santahu koorr kareh vaddiaaee |13|
lines.english: One who does not understand his own self, O Saints, falsely flatters himself. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣਹਿ ਗਤਿ ਮਿਤਿ ਤਿਨ ਹੀ ਪਾਈ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: jin antar sabad aap pachhaaneh gat mit tin hee paaee |15|
lines.english: Those who have the Shabad deep within, understand themselves; they find the way of salvation. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਖੰਡਿ ਕੀਨੈ ਜਮੁ ਨਹੀ ਛੋਡੈ ਲੈ ਜਾਸੀ ਪਤਿ ਗਵਾਈ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: paakhandd keenai jam nahee chhoddai lai jaasee pat gavaaee |14|
lines.english: The Messenger of Death does not give up on those who practices hypocrisy; they are dragged away in disgrace. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹੁ ਮਨੂਆ ਸੁੰਨ ਸਮਾਧਿ ਲਗਾਵੈ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਈ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: ehu manooaa sun samaadh lagaavai jotee jot milaaee |16|
lines.english: Their minds enter into the deepest state of Samaadhi, and their light is absorbed into the Light. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗਾਵੈ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਵੈ ਦਰਿ ਸਾਚੈ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਈ ॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: guramukh gaavai aap gavaavai dar saachai sobhaa paaee |18|
lines.english: The Gurmukhs sing the Lord's Praises, and erase self-conceit; they obtain true honor in the Court of the Lord. ||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਸੁਣਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਖਾਣਹਿ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮੇਲਾਈ ॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: sun sun guramukh naam vakhaaneh satasangat melaaee |17|
lines.english: The Gurmukhs listen constantly to the Naam, and chant it in the True Congregation. ||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਚੁ ਵਖਾਣੈ ਸਚਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: saachee baanee sach vakhaanai sach naam liv laaee |19|
lines.english: True are their words; they speak only the Truth; they lovingly focus on the True Name. ||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਭੰਜਨੁ ਅਤਿ ਪਾਪ ਨਿਖੰਜਨੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅੰਤਿ ਸਖਾਈ ॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: bhai bhanjan at paap nikhanjan meraa prabh ant sakhaaee |20|
lines.english: My God is the Destroyer of fear, the Destroyer of sin; in the end, He is our only help and support. ||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਵਰਤੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥੨੧॥੩॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh aape aap varatai naanak naam vaddiaaee |21|3|12|
lines.english: He Himself pervades and permeates everything; O Nanak, glorious greatness is obtained through the Naam. ||21||3||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਕੁਚਲ ਕੁਚੀਲ ਅਤਿ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੀ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਬਦੇ ਮੈਲੁ ਉਤਾਰੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ham kuchal kucheel at abhimaanee mil sabade mail utaaree |1|
lines.english: I am filthy and polluted, proud and egotistical; receiving the Word of the Shabad, my filth is taken away. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮਕਲੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: raamakalee mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Raamkalee, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਹੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਨਿਸਤਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: santahu guramukh naam nisataaree |
lines.english: O Saints, the Gurmukhs are saved through the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸਿਆ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਕਰਤੈ ਆਪਿ ਸਵਾਰੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa naam vasiaa ghatt antar karatai aap savaaree |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The True Name abides deep within their hearts. The Creator Himself embellishes them. ||1||Pause||
